exercises.questionText: This shape is FOLDED in half. Which shows what it looks like folded?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 500 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='120' y='28' font-size='14' fill='#6b7280' text-anchor='middle'>Original shape</text><rect x='20' y='40' width='200' height='130' rx='10' fill='#dbeafe' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='70' cy='105' r='25' fill='#3b82f6'/><circle cx='170' cy='75' r='15' fill='#f59e0b'/><line x1='120' y1='40' x2='120' y2='170' stroke='#f97316' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 4'/><text x='120' y='188' font-size='12' fill='#f97316' text-anchor='middle'>fold here →</text><text x='360' y='28' font-size='14' fill='#6b7280' text-anchor='middle'>After folding →</text></svg>
exercises.correctAnswer: Big blue circle visible, small dot hidden
options: Big blue circle visible, small dot hidden

exercises.questionText: If you rotate this shape ↻ (turn it to the right), what does it look like?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 260 220' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='130' y='22' font-size='14' fill='#6b7280' text-anchor='middle'>Original — which answer matches when rotated?</text><rect x='70' y='40' width='120' height='160' rx='10' fill='#f3f4f6' stroke='#d1d5db' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='88' y='58' width='40' height='40' rx='5' fill='#6366f1'/><circle cx='168' cy='78' r='20' fill='#f59e0b'/><rect x='88' y='118' width='84' height='20' rx='5' fill='#10b981'/></svg>
exercises.correctAnswer: Tall shape, purple square on RIGHT, yellow circle on LEFT
options: Tall shape, purple square on RIGHT, yellow circle on LEFT
Tall shape, purple square on LEFT, yellow circle on RIGHT
Wide shape, purple square on top

exercises.questionText: ✏️ is to 📝 as 🖌️ is to …?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 480 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='20' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#fef9c3' stroke='#fde047' stroke-width='2'/><text x='60' y='68' font-size='40' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>✏️</text><text x='125' y='68' font-size='28' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>→</text><rect x='140' y='20' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#fef9c3' stroke='#fde047' stroke-width='2'/><text x='190' y='68' font-size='40' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>📝</text><text x='265' y='68' font-size='36' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central' fill='#6b7280'>as</text><rect x='300' y='20' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dcfce7' stroke='#86efac' stroke-width='2'/><text x='350' y='68' font-size='40' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🖌️</text><text x='415' y='68' font-size='28' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>→</text><rect x='430' y='10' width='40' height='100' rx='12' fill='#fff7ed' stroke='#fb923c' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 3'/><text x='450' y='68' font-size='28' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>?</text></svg>

exercises.questionText: 🐣 is to 🐔 as 🥚 is to …? (What does an egg become?)
🌱 is to 🌳 as 👶 is to …?
🌞 : ☀️ light :: 🌧️ : ___  (Rain gives us …?)
Which one does NOT belong with the others?

exercises.questionText: Which creature does NOT belong? Think carefully about what they have in common!
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 480 110' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dcfce7' stroke='#86efac' stroke-width='2'/><text x='60' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🐟</text><rect x='125' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dcfce7' stroke='#86efac' stroke-width='2'/><text x='175' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🐬</text><rect x='240' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dcfce7' stroke='#86efac' stroke-width='2'/><text x='290' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦈</text><rect x='355' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#fef9c3' stroke='#fde047' stroke-width='2'/><text x='405' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🐋</text></svg>

exercises.questionText: The picture has a piece missing! Which piece fits perfectly?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 320 280' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='40' y='20' width='240' height='240' rx='16' fill='#ede9fe' stroke='#a78bfa' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='160' cy='140' r='70' fill='#8b5cf6'/><rect x='130' y='110' width='60' height='60' rx='8' fill='#c4b5fd'/><rect x='180' y='20' width='100' height='100' rx='0' fill='white'/><text x='230' y='78' font-size='40' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>?</text><rect x='180' y='20' width='100' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#fb923c' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 4'/></svg>
exercises.correctAnswer: Purple corner with part of the purple circle
options: Purple corner with part of the purple circle

exercises.questionText: This is a face! Which piece completes it?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 300 280' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='150' cy='140' r='110' fill='#fef9c3' stroke='#fde047' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='110' cy='110' r='18' fill='#1e293b'/><circle cx='190' cy='110' r='18' fill='#1e293b'/><path d='M100,180 Q150,220 200,180' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='110' y='20' width='80' height='70' rx='0' fill='white'/><text x='150' y='62' font-size='28' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>?</text><rect x='110' y='20' width='80' height='70' fill='none' stroke='#fb923c' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8 4'/></svg>
options: Top of head with a third eye
Top of head with the nose

exercises.questionText: 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟  — How many stars?
Count only the RED shapes!

exercises.questionText: How many triangles can you find? (Look carefully — some may be inside others!)
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 360 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><polygon points='180,20 340,280 20,280' fill='#bfdbfe' stroke='#3b82f6' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='180,20 260,150 100,150' fill='#93c5fd' stroke='#3b82f6' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='100,150 260,150 180,280' fill='#60a5fa' stroke='#3b82f6' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='20,280 100,150 180,280' fill='#93c5fd' stroke='#3b82f6' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='260,150 340,280 180,280' fill='#93c5fd' stroke='#3b82f6' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

exercises.questionText: Look at the pattern for 3 seconds, then answer: How many YELLOW circles were there?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 480 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='25' fill='#facc15'/><circle cx='120' cy='60' r='25' fill='#ef4444'/><circle cx='190' cy='60' r='25' fill='#facc15'/><circle cx='260' cy='60' r='25' fill='#3b82f6'/><circle cx='330' cy='60' r='25' fill='#facc15'/><circle cx='400' cy='60' r='25' fill='#22c55e'/><text x='240' y='108' font-size='13' fill='#9ca3af' text-anchor='middle'>(Remember: count the yellow ones!)</text></svg>

exercises.questionText: Which one belongs in the SKY?
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 480 110' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dbeafe' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='2'/><text x='60' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦅</text><rect x='125' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dbeafe' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='2'/><text x='175' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🐠</text><rect x='240' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx='12' fill='#dbeafe' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='2'/><text x='290' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦎</text><rect x='355' y='15' width='100' height='80' rx-='12' fill='#dbeafe' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='2'/><text x='405' y='62' font-size='44' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🐢</text></svg>

exercises.questionText: Which one is NOT a living thing?
If all cats have 4 legs, and Whiskers is a cat — how many legs does Whiskers have?
Mia has more stickers than Tom. Tom has more stickers than Leo. Who has the MOST stickers?
Every day it rains, Lily uses her umbrella. Today Lily is using her umbrella. What can we say?
What comes next? (Look at the jumps between numbers!)
exercises.graphic: <svg width='100%' viewBox='0 0 600 90' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='20' width='80' height='50' rx='12' fill='#fce7f3' stroke='#f9a8d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='50' y='52' font-size='26' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>1</text><rect x='115' y='20' width='80' height='50' rx='12' fill='#fce7f3' stroke='#f9a8d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='155' y='52' font-size='26' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>3</text><rect x='220' y='20' width='80' height='50' rx='12' fill='#fce7f3' stroke='#f9a8d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='260' y='52' font-size='26' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>6</text><rect x='325' y='20' width='80' height='50' rx='12' fill='#fce7f3' stroke='#f9a8d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='365' y='52' font-size='26' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>10</text><rect x='430' y='20' width='80' height='50' rx='12' fill='#fff7ed' stroke='#fb923c' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 3'/><text x='470' y='52' font-size='26' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>?</text><text x='92' y='18' font-size='11' fill='#9ca3af' text-anchor='middle'>+2</text><text x='197' y='18' font-size='11' fill='#9ca3af' text-anchor='middle'>+3</text><text x='302' y='18' font-size='11' fill='#9ca3af' text-anchor='middle'>+4</text><text x='407' y='18' font-size='11' fill='#9ca3af' text-anchor='middle'>+5</text></svg>

exercises.questionText: The pattern has two rules! What goes in the box?

exercises.questionText: A cardboard pizza box 🍕📦 — which bin does it go in?
There are 5 birds on a fence. A cat scares 2 away. How many birds are left?
